hero.lead: KREA is a creative technology studio. We design brands, products and digital worlds at the intersection of art, code and intelligence.

brand.title: Brand System
brand.desc: Strategy, naming, visual and verbal identity. From concept through full implementation.

product.title: Product Design
product.desc: Interfaces with their own architecture and rhythm. From first sketch to production launch.

motion.title: Motion Design
motion.desc: Cinematic movement that brings interfaces to life and makes brands breathe.

ai.title: AI Systems
ai.desc: Generative tools, agentic interfaces, intelligent surfaces. Technology that stays beautiful.

web.title: Web Engineering
web.desc: Next.js, edge infrastructure, CMS, WebGL. Sites built for speed and longevity.

three.title: 3D & Interactive
three.desc: Three.js, R3F, shaders, real-time rendering. Worlds you can walk into in a browser.

philosophy.quote: Design is the last interface between intent and outcome. We build it like infrastructure, approach it like cinema.

steps.name: Listen, understand
steps.desc: Conversation, audit, diagnosis. Before moving a single pixel, every intention is clear.

steps.name: Course & strategy
steps.desc: Positioning, narrative, principles. The studio aligns on one horizon and moves toward it.

steps.name: Design in motion
steps.desc: Identity system, product surfaces and motion language develop in parallel. Static is dead.

steps.name: Engineer, ship
steps.desc: Next.js, R3F, edge architecture — all engineering is ours. Designers and developers together until comp matches reality.

steps.name: On orbit, evolve
steps.desc: We don't disappear after launch. Quarterly reviews, system development, partnership built on accumulated quality.

items.q: KREA didn't redesign our product—they rewrote how users relate to money. Every screen is a deliberate sentence.
The craft is unusual. They engineer motion the way Pixar builds a frame. Calculation in every move.
We've worked with the best in London and New York. KREA is another league. Quieter. Sharper. Like an atelier.

form.label: Start a project / 005
form.title: Let's build something unrepeatable.
form.lead: Tell us about your project. We'll respond within one business day.
